studies.title: Prospective randomised study on multimodal self-treatment of women with incontinence complaints using a digital health application

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the Kranus Mictera app as the digital therapy being evaluated for urinary incontinence in women. The product name appears in the trial description, and Kranus Health GmbH is identified as the conducting organization.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'prospective randomised study' with participants allocated to an intervention group receiving digital therapy and a control group continuing previous treatments, indicating a randomized controlled trial design.
